creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
Wonder if this issue is general?

https://code.google.com/p/chromium/issues/detail?can=2&start=0&num=100&q=accent%20keys&colspec=ID%20Pri%20M%20Iteration%20ReleaseBlock%20Cr%20Status%20Owner%20Summary%20OS%20Modified&groupby=&sort=&id=230921

It would be quite amazing that this is not working for chromium at all for such a long time... but wouldn't be a first :)
